# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata: 
    name: linkerd-server   # Name of the server account to create in Linkerd namespace (default is 'linkerd')
---    
apiVersion: authorization.openshift.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
    annotations: 
        linkerd.io/inject: "enabled" # Enable automatic injection of server-side policies into all namespaces by Linkerd controller (default is 'true')  
spec:    
    selector:     
       namespaceSelector: {}
